headlines.title: NASA barrels ahead with moon base plans, doling out nearly $600 million in new contracts
headlines.description: The announcement is the latest in a stream of funding contracts NASA has awarded private companies in its effort to establish a permanent presence on the moon.

headlines.title: TikTok reaches settlement with Florida teen ahead of July social media addiction trial
headlines.description: The case was part of consolidated litigation alleging major social platforms used addictive designs that harmed youths’ mental health.

headlines.title: U.S. lifts ban on Anthropic’s powerful Fable 5 AI model
headlines.description: Part of the company’s Claude family of AI systems, Fable 5 was forced offline after administration officials said it posed severe cybersecurity risks.

headlines.title: A golden ticket for AI: Netflix re-creates Gene Wilder’s voice for new ‘Willy Wonka’ show
headlines.description: The streamer said it received the consent of the late actor’s estate for its new competition series, which will debut in September.

headlines.title: June jobs report likely to show stable hiring, but economists see plenty of warning signs
headlines.description: The June jobs report is expected to show the trend of stable hiring continued for a fourth straight month.

headlines.title: AI-powered robots are new tech searching ocean floors for mines
headlines.description: An exclusive look at Greensea IQ's AI-powered robots that can find and clear mines on the ocean floor. A powerful new tool that minimizes the human risk of deactivating these deadly hazards. NBC News' Brian Cheung reports.

headlines.title: South Korea sees new dopamine trend in digital window shopping
headlines.description: South Korea is seeing a new trend in websites people are using to create dopamine by digital window shopping. NBC News' Dr. Akshay Syal talks more about the benefits and drawbacks of using it.

headlines.title: Inside the new space shuttle ‘Endeavour’ exhibit at California Science Center
headlines.description: NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz previews the new exhibit at the California Science Center, where visitors will soon be able to view NASA’s space shuttle Endeavour in its ready-to-launch position.

headlines.title: A.I. takes center stage in health topics discussed at the Aspen Ideas festival
headlines.description: Right now, some of the world's brightest leaders, scholars and artists are in Colorado for the Aspen Ideas festival. NBC News’ Kate Snow went to discuss how A.I. Is reshaping the classroom and how we manage our health.

headlines.title: Struggling to Focus? Here's How to Train Your Attention Span
headlines.description: In a world of constant distractions, it can be difficult to stay focused, so psychotherapist Niro Feliciano joins TODAY with tips on how to train your attention span. She advises setting time blocks, creating phone-free zones and touts the benefits of making lists.

headlines.title: Apple Announces it is Raising Prices on MacBooks and iPads
headlines.description: Apple said on Thursday it will immediately raise prices on its MacBook laptops, iPads and iMac desktop computers. The announcement sent Apple shares falling about six percent, the biggest drop in more than a year.

headlines.title: Physicist reacts to Trump executive order calling for a quantum computer
headlines.description: NBC News' Gadi Schwartz talks to California Institute of Technology Professor John Preskill about President Trump's executive order calling for a quantum computer. Preskill talks about what he hopes comes out of the order and what to look out for.
